Door Closer

Norton 7500H 689

Quote Required

Norton hold open door closer. Tri-packed: regular, parallel or top jamb (to 3" reveal).

Request Quote Call (831) 555-0100
Authorized ASSA ABLOY Distributor
Expert Installation Available
Direct Vendor Pricing

Product Details

Norton hold open door closer. Tri-packed: regular, parallel or top jamb (to 3" reveal).

Norton 7500 Series is a robust, multi-sized surface closer designed to deliver superior performance and long-term reliability. Ideal for interior or exterior doors in high security and institutional facilities that demand reliability.

7500 Series is a robust, multi-sized surface closer designed to deliver superior performance and long-term reliability. Ideal for interior or exterior doors in high security and institutional facilities that demand reliability.
